title: Bloom Energy (BE) Stock Forecast & Analyst Price Targets
text: Stock analysis platforms aggregate analyst forecasts and price targets for Bloom Energy, providing comprehensive view of Wall Street consensus. According to 21 analysts covering the company, average price target stands at $191, reflecting mixed views on current valuation. Price targets range significantly from low $45 to high $335, indicating wide range of analyst opinions. The high forecast of $335 suggests belief in continued multi-year growth trajectory and AI infrastructure tailwinds. The low forecast around $45 reflects bear case assumptions of slower adoption or competitive pressures. Consensus rating leans toward Buy, with approximately 60% of analysts recommending purchase. Typical bear thesis emphasizes valuation risk, execution risk on large contracts, and customer concentration. Bull thesis emphasizes AI infrastructure tailwinds, strong partnerships with Oracle and Brookfield, manufacturing scalability, and margin expansion potential. Current stock price trades above average analyst target, suggesting market has priced in optimistic growth assumptions. Investors should carefully evaluate their own AI infrastructure thesis before investing at premium valuations. Analyst commentary generally acknowledges strong business execution while emphasizing importance of flawless execution on large customer commitments.
